title: CE-RISE Digital Passport System: Local Demonstrator
description: Local, Docker-only demonstrator for the CE-RISE Digital Passport system, running the hex-core-service with a reference backend and scripted flows to authenticate, upload/validate a passport record, persist it, and log in again to read it back.
notes: v0.0.2 - Fixes ot align with core service v0.0.9.
